channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bed dumped, 10th April
item.description:
At lane to Patterson Park next to no. 174 Lynton Rd please remove? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abercorn Way, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paving trip hazard, 10th April
item.description:
Liverpool road east side pedestrian trip hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Liverpool Road, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on double yellows and blocking pavement, 10th April
item.description:
Out side new flats that have been built on Goldsel Road, there are often cars parked on the double yellow lines and on the pavement blocking it .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edwards Gardens, St Mary's, Swanley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Zebra crossing refuge has no tactile paving as required, 10th April
item.description:
Zebra crossing refuge has no tactile paving as required

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 173, Rosebery Avenue, Clerkenwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 61 hearns road HMO dumping rubbish in street, 10th April
item.description:
Education of tenants required of when bin day is and that the pavement is not a dumping ground. Please remove this rubbish urgently its been there nearly a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Hearns Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of clothin etc fly tipped st entrance into Nickleby zclose, 10th April
item.description:
Large amoints of bafs have been there for several days and niw bags are ope and allnovet the roaf.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nickelby Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 laughing gas canisters on roundabout, 10th April
item.description:
These were on the roundabout when the grass was cut this week along with a bagful of rubbish which was not cleared before mowing. This included glass bottles. I have cleared the rubbish but not the gas canisters.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Forest Way, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road needs resurfacing all along Luddesdon Road, 10th April
item.description:
The surface along Luddesdon Road has not been resurfaced for years and the road especially near the shops the surfaces is very uneven. It is potentially a trip hazard. The road is used a lot because it is a cut through to the shops.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Luddesdon Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bucket, 10th April
item.description:
Bucket dumped outside Flaxman Court

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Hoddesdon Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping trolly, 10th April
item.description:
Shopping trolly abandoned at the entrance of Sutherland Court
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thesiger Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th April
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blanchedowne, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed glass, 10th April
item.description:
At rear of herrick house

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Howard Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Silver Birch dropping small branches and twigs on public highway causing punctures on mobility scooters, 10th April
item.description:
Silver birch has been teported to L@Q housing over a ye ago, these trees are dropping small branches and twigs onto our path and public highway causing our mobility wcooters to get punchures, it stops us going out as it can take a week to get scooter repaired, its untenable now . Please have these trees removed..
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tower Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish recently dumped on Poole Road, 10th April
item.description:
Rubbish is often dumped against this wall in Poole Road, this photo shows what has been left out in the past two days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cassland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Silver birch dropping it branches on public highway, 10th April
item.description:
I've been telling L@Q about this for years, and reported it to you lot over a yr ago, its now puncturing our mobility scooter tyres, it means we cant get out, takes 4 to 5 days to get scooter tyre repaired and itvaint cheap, the Silver Birch trees are dangerous dropping small branches and twigs all over the public pavement and our own footpath puncturing our mobility scooter tyres. Its untennable stopping us from going out. Please have these two trees removed, their is another just like it 20 ft away doing the same thing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tower Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins and misuse of recycling systems, 10th April
item.description:
Number 70 Paragon Road has continually overflowing bins. Recycling bags are not used correctly. The bins are on the street and the rubbish is often overflowing onto the pavement causing a health hazard as well as an unpleasant environment for neighbours.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paragon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Champion Park SE5, near junction with Windsor Walk. Suspected abandon cycle., 10th April
item.description:
Make : Carrera Colour: white / black Comments : deflated tires not moved in months Location: affixed to Sheffield stand.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Champion Park, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins overglowing, 10th April
item.description:
Bins are full every time I try to recycle cardboard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackthorn Grove, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere after bin collection, 10th April
item.description:
I went outside and there's litter everywhere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazel Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere, 10th April
item.description:
Pile of litter overflowing on pavement outside Tesco

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet
